display_text: Safety Bubble, Cost: 0, Tier N/A (Non-Purchasable): Equipped Hero gains a 100 HP Barrier against enemy damage. Barrier fully regenerates after not receiving damage for 8 seconds. Acts as an early-game defensive layer for survivability. Self-inflicted damage bypasses the barrier. Stats: Barrier HP: 100, Restore Time: 8s.
